---
title: "Contact"
pagetitle: "Contact — Bingjin Xue"
---

## Email

[bingjin.xue@unh.edu](mailto:bingjin.xue@unh.edu) — best way to reach me.

## Office

Paul College of Business and Economics
University of New Hampshire
10 Garrison Avenue
Durham, NH 03824

## Elsewhere

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID)
- [SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=YOUR_ID)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME)
- [UNH faculty page](https://paulcollege.unh.edu/person/bingjin-xue)

## For students

If you are a UNH undergraduate thinking about an honors thesis or research project in applied microeconomics, health economics, or econometrics, please reach out. Include a short paragraph about what you are interested in and a transcript.
